score.top_strength: The agent responded promptly to the parent's inquiry and acknowledged the question about full-day care availability for a 2-year-old, showing basic attentiveness.
score.top_gap: The agent provided no actual response to the parent's question. The transcript shows only the parent speaking; there is no agent dialogue, meaning the agent either did not respond or the call ended immediately without any sales conversation occurring.
score.coaching_note: This call appears incomplete or the agent did not engage with the prospect. In any future interaction, immediately address the parent's primary need (full-day care for a 2-year-old), then proactively introduce Footprints' three key differentiators: live CCTV safety monitoring, HighScope curriculum for child development, and nutritious in-house meals. transcript: AI: Hi. I wanted to understand if you have a day care facility for my 2 year old daughter. From morning till evening.
